top_signals.title: Santos Targets LNG and Oil Expansion in Alaska, Oceania and Australia
top_signals.summary: Australia's Santos will prioritise LNG and oil growth in three core regions, including Alaska and Papua New Guinea, under a new strategy that also includes reducing net debt by $2.5 billion by 2030."We are now laser-focused on investment in major oil and LNG production across three regions…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX to drive a Cybertruck through corporate governance norms
top_signals.summary: Provisions in the IPO prospectus will give Elon Musk more freedom — and potentially less accountability
